meaning: pron.我的int.<口>嗳呀!啊呀! [域] Malaysia ,马来西亚
examples: I let my feelings be my guide.
My shorts were chafing my thighs.
My sex life is my business.
The recent decline in gasoline consumption is my first example that there is hope.
My system came with eight dimly photocopied pages devoted mostly to support, warranty and return policies.
